abilities.name: Demise (Hunted)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, if it was killed by a friendly Lord Cooper, draw two cards.

abilities.name: Head Start
abilities.text: This model must be deployed on the centerline.

abilities.name: Insignificant
abilities.text: This model cannot declare the Interact action and is ignored for strategies and schemes.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Just Let Me By
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Desperate Duck: Place this model anywhere within 2".

actions.name: Call for Help
actions.effects: Target gains a Distracted token. After resolving this action, a friendly Lord Cooper must declare a (melee) action targeting this model, if able.

actions.name: Escape
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot be declared by non-Runaway models. This model must be within 4" of a table corner and in the opposing player's deployment zone.
actions.effects: This model may draw 3 cards and make a Scheme marker anywhere on the table. Then, remove this model from the game (it is not killed).
